description_long: This van features a boxy, utilitarian shape with a turquoise and green color scheme, decorated with stylized flowers and a whimsical logo on the side reading 'MYSTERY MACHINE.' The body shows signs of wear, including faded paint and smudges, giving it a well-used, vintage appearance. The front windshield is large and dark, with blacked-out side windows and a pair of rear windows. The wheels are black with flower-patterned hubcaps, matching the playful theme. The rear of the van has two rectangular windows and simple tail lights, while the sides display sliding door seams and painted details. The overall design is reminiscent of a classic cartoon or retro custom van, likely intended for group travel or adventure.
description: A turquoise and green vintage van with flower motifs, cartoonish details, and a 'MYSTERY MACHINE' logo, showing signs of wear and playful customization.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the 'MYSTERY MACHINE' logo, flower decals, and a sliding door seam.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying two rectangular windows, tail lights, and a faded green lower panel.
description_view_2: Right side view with similar flower motifs, logo, and sliding door seam as the left side.
description_view_3: Front view featuring a large, dark windshield and a simple, rounded front end.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
